title: History of item not being moved to new board

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
@monday.com may I ask why the history (Activity Log) of an item that you move from one board to the other is lost?

In many cases this is highly inconvenient!

Thanks

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for pointing that out - right now, this is how it works. We’ll pass on your comments though, Eltjo!

posts.author: mdudor (Melanie)
posts.cookedHtml: This has been a huge problem for us too and would help us out a lot if it transferred.

posts.author: johana.Echelon (Johanna Izquierdo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Julia, Have you guys looked into transferring the activity logs along any time that an items is moved to new board?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @johana.Echelon, that’s a great idea! Would you be able to submit it as a feature request here? Any information you can provide about your use case will help us prioritize this request. @mdudor @Eltjo
